researchVision: Focused on decoding the mathematical architecture of the universe, specifically the geometric validity of gravity and the topological nature of dimensionality. My objective is to utilize advanced formalism to explore the underlying constraints of reference frames, the fundamental structure of time, and the precise definitions of freedom within physical systems.
researchInterests: Number Theory (Theory of p-adic L-functions and their applications)
Mathematical General Relativity, Theory of Gravity & its modifications
Cosmology, Dark Matter and Dark Energy stability analysis
Geometric Analysis, Theory of Manifolds, and Non-Smooth Differential Geometry
Lie Theory and Analysis of PDEs
Lie Sphere Geometry, Integrable Systems, and Geometric Variational Problems
Special Functions and Fractional Calculus (Applications in Physics), Integral Transforms
